name: tutorial
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.lessons.every(l => typeof l.id === 'string' && Array.isArray(l.examples))
_note: root.tutorial returns a deterministic, code-derived set of >=5 worked-example lessons (six glyphs / conversion / fractional radix / operations / refusal-absorbs). Every example's numbers are computed live from the real conversion + operation primitives so the lesson can never drift. Takes no input, no DB/actor dependency — always ok:true.
